name: label_smoothing
why: Label smoothing=0.05 softens targets, regularizes logits toward smaller magnitudes, which should improve quantization friendliness. No community PR tests this, so it covers an unexplored region.
validates: Better post-quant val_bpb due to smaller logit magnitudes.
falsifies: Label smoothing hurts the model's ability to assign confident predictions.
notes: Wildcard hypothesis. No community PR tests label smoothing.
Watch: pre-quant vs post-quant gap. Smoothing should reduce the gap.
